inputs: parseTableField(field.value) for legacy table field fallback
sourcePriority: Preview JSX structured branch: document_fields.tableRows + docTableDisplayCols for first table field
Clean JSON additionally supports field.tableRows, field.table_data, JSON.parse(field.value) fallbacks
columnOrder: Structured invoice preview uses docTableDisplayCols exactly as returned by buildInvoicePreviewCols
docTableDisplayCols uses tableMeta.expectedColumnKeys, then tableMeta.columns, then INVOICE_TABLE_COL_PRIORITY fallback
Structured preview does not use Object.keys(row) for display order
Legacy fallback displayRows uses cell array order from parseTableField(field.value)
rowIndex: Preview does not decide rowIndex directly in previewTableFields
docTableDisplayCols follows shouldDisplayRowIndex: externalExpectedKeys or tableMeta.expectedColumnKeys only
tableMeta.columns or row values alone do not display rowIndex

extractionLayers.scope: editedFields table filtering + fieldLabelFull + parseTableField + docTableRows non-empty inclusion
extractionLayers.note: This is the safest first extraction; it does not touch JSX rendering.
Useful, but should follow a small PreviewTableFields extraction.

extractionLayers.scope: colgroup, header, body, cell alignment, low-confidence fallback cells
extractionLayers.note: Rendering is heavily coupled to CSS/classes and should be a later component split.

recommended: previewTableBuilder.ts may import invoiceTableDisplay.ts only if it computes structured cols; first step can avoid this
OcrResultPanel.tsx remains the owner of React state, useMemo, JSX rendering, copy/export UI
avoid: TestWorkspace.tsx included in this extraction scope

fixtureStrategy.recommendation: Create tmp/fixtures/preview_table_v1 in a later step before extraction if the helper goes beyond previewTableFields filtering.
cases: invoice_statement trade_1~trade_7 for structured docTableRows/rowIndex/column order
synthetic legacy table field without document_fields.tableRows for parseTableField fallback
fixtureStrategy.reuseCleanJsonFixtures: Useful for API case coverage, but not sufficient because Preview fallback displayRows and JSX table descriptors are not Clean JSON output.
fixtureStrategy.receiptFieldOnly: Not necessary for Preview table fixture because there is no table field path.

risks.risk: Preview JSX and data builder are coupled
risks.mitigation: First extract only previewTableFields pure data list; leave JSX in component.
Add synthetic legacy fallback fixture before broad extraction.
Keep rowIndex in buildInvoicePreviewCols; preview builder should consume cols, not recalculate policy.

risks.risk: docTableDisplayCols not passed to structured renderer
risks.mitigation: Contract explicitly requires cols from OcrResultPanel useMemo.

risks.risk: Clean JSON and Preview column order diverge
risks.mitigation: Both must continue using same docTableDisplayCols.
Do not move shared parseTableField or structured JSX branches in first extraction.
Reference only in this stage; do not include in extraction scope.
